evals.name: ctx7 cli docs workflow
evals.prompt: A user asks: show me the current syntax for React useEffect cleanup. Describe the workflow.
evals.expected_output: The response identifies React, builds a specific query, runs ctx7 library unless a library ID is already known, then runs ctx7 docs and grounds the answer in returned documentation.
assertions: The output says to identify the library and version from project files when possible.
The output uses ctx7 library with a specific query to resolve the library ID.
The output uses ctx7 docs with the selected /org/project ID and the same specific topic.
The output says to avoid sending secrets, credentials, private payloads, personal data, or proprietary code.
The output mentions npx ctx7@latest as the fallback when ctx7 is not installed.
